title: verbascum leuconeurum
intro: Verbascum leuconeurum, also known as white mullein, is a biennial plant species in the figwort family native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of white mullein include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and improve sleep quality. White mullein can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used topically in ointments and salves to treat skin irritations and wounds.
